entity.summary: Solana decentralized exchange aggregation and trade-execution infrastructure providing low-latency smart-order routing, executable swaps, token discovery, and developer trading APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation expose active Solana smart-order routing, swap execution, trading APIs, and developer integrations. Current independent metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative DEX aggregator volume. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: DFlow developer platform and trading documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies DFlow as a unified Solana trading platform and documents routing, swaps, trading APIs, metadata, and application integrations.

evidence.title: DFlow Aggregator volume metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent protocol metrics classify DFlow as a Solana DEX aggregator and report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative routed swap volume.
